name: terraform
description: The Terraform provider for Pulumi lets you consume the outputs contained in Terraform state from your Pulumi programs.

name.description: The full name of one remote workspace. When configured, only the default workspace can be used. This option conflicts with prefix.

prefix.description: A prefix used in the names of one or more remote workspaces, all of which can be used with this configuration. The full workspace names are used in HCP Terraform, and the short names (minus the prefix) are used on the command line for Terraform CLI workspaces. If omitted, only the default workspace can be used. This option conflicts with name.

terraform:state:getLocalReference.description: Access state from the local filesystem.

path.description: The path to the tfstate file. This defaults to "terraform.tfstate" relative to the root module by default.

outputs.description: The result of fetching from a Terraform state store.
The outputs displayed from Terraform state.

terraform:state:getRemoteReference.description: Access state from a remote backend.

hostname.description: The remote backend hostname to connect to.

organization.description: The name of the organization containing the targeted workspace(s).

token.description: The token used to authenticate with the remote backend.

outputs.description: The result of fetching from a Terraform state store.
The outputs displayed from Terraform state.

terraform:state:getS3Reference.description: Access state from an AWS S3 bucket.

bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket.

encrypt.description: Whether to enable server side encryption of the state file.

endpoint.description: A custom endpoint for the S3 API.

forcePathStyle.description: Force s3 to use path-style addressing instead of virtual hosted-bucket addressing. Required by most S3-compatible stores.

iamEndpoint.description: A custom endpoint for the IAM API.

key.description: The path to the state file inside the bucket. When using a non-default workspace, the state path is /workspace_key_prefix/workspace_name/key.

kmsKeyId.description: The ARN of a KMS Key to use for encrypting the state.

maxRetries.description: The maximum number of times an AWS API request is retried on retryable failure.

profile.description: AWS profile name as set in the shared credentials file.

region.description: AWS region of the S3 bucket. Falls back to the AWS_REGION or AWS_DEFAULT_REGION environment variables when unset.

sharedCredentialsFile.description: Path to a shared credentials file.

skipCredentialsValidation.description: Skip the credentials validation via the STS API.

skipMetadataApiCheck.description: Skip the AWS Metadata API check.

skipRegionValidation.description: Skip static validation of region name.

sseCustomerKey.description: The base64-encoded encryption key to use for server-side encryption with customer-provided keys (SSE-C).

stsEndpoint.description: A custom endpoint for the STS API.

workspace.description: The Terraform workspace to read state from.

workspaceKeyPrefix.description: The prefix applied to the non-default state path inside the bucket.

outputs.description: The result of fetching from a Terraform state store.
The outputs displayed from Terraform state.
